name: Men's Cotton Formal Shirt
description: Premium cotton formal shirt perfect for office and events. Breathable fabric, crisp collar, easy-iron finish. Available in multiple sizes.

name: Men's Denim Jeans
description: Classic straight-fit denim jeans with durable stitching. Comfortable mid-rise waist. Fades beautifully with wash. Sizes 28 to 40.

name: Men's Sports T-Shirt
description: Lightweight dry-fit sports t-shirt. Moisture-wicking fabric keeps you cool during workouts. Round neck, short sleeve.

name: Women's Anarkali Kurti
description: Elegant Anarkali kurti with beautiful floral print. Soft cotton fabric, flared cut, perfect for festive and casual wear.

name: Women's Salwar Suit Set
description: 3-piece salwar suit set including top, bottom and dupatta. Rich fabric with embroidery work, ready to wear.

name: Women's Casual Kurti
description: Comfortable everyday kurti in soft cotton. Simple yet stylish design. Machine washable. Great for work and home wear.

name: Kids School Uniform Set
description: Complete school uniform set with shirt and trouser or skirt. Durable fabric, easy to wash. Sizes for ages 4 to 14 years.

name: Kids Cartoon T-Shirt
description: Fun cartoon-printed kids t-shirt. Soft cotton fabric, safe dyes, vibrant colors that last many washes. Ages 2 to 12.

name: Basmati Rice 5kg
description: Premium aged long-grain basmati rice. Aromatic, fluffy when cooked. Ideal for biryani and pulao. Sourced fresh from mills.

name: Toor Dal 1kg
description: High quality washed toor dal. Protein-rich, cooks quickly. Free from impurities. Packed hygienically in sealed bag.

name: Refined Sunflower Oil 1L
description: Light refined sunflower oil rich in Vitamin E. Ideal for everyday cooking, frying and salads. Low cholesterol, heart-healthy.

name: Men's Sports Shoes
description: Lightweight breathable sports shoes with cushioned sole. Anti-slip outsole, EVA midsole for comfort. Sizes 6 to 11.

name: Women's Flat Sandals
description: Comfortable flat sandals with soft footbed. Adjustable buckle strap, non-slip sole. Perfect for daily wear. Sizes 3 to 8.

name: Kids School Shoes
description: Durable black school shoes with velcro or lace closure. Leather-like upper, flexible sole for active kids. Sizes 1 to 8.

name: Non-Stick Kadai 3L
description: Heavy-duty non-stick kadai with tempered glass lid. Even heat distribution, no-stick coating, stay-cool handles. 3 litre capacity.

name: Stainless Steel Tiffin Box
description: 3-tier stainless steel tiffin box with leak-proof lid. Food-grade steel, dishwasher safe, airtight compartments.

name: Cotton Double Bedsheet Set
description: Soft 100% cotton double bedsheet with 2 pillow covers. 180 thread count, vibrant printed design, machine washable.

name: Decorative Cushion Cover Set
description: Set of 5 decorative cushion covers in assorted prints. Zipper closure, polyester fabric, fits 16x16 inch cushions.

name: Cricket Bat Kashmir Willow
description: Full-size Kashmir willow cricket bat. Ideal for tape ball and leather ball. Smooth finish, strong edges, good pick-up weight.

name: School Backpack 30L
description: Durable 30L school backpack with padded laptop sleeve, multiple pockets, waterproof base, ergonomic padded straps.
